name: Vidalia Onion Risotto with Feta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chopped Vidalia or other sweet onion
1 1/2 cups Arborio or other short-grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic, and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Stir in rice.
4. Add 1/2 cup broth; cook until the liquid is nearly absorbed, stirring constantly.
5. Add the remaining broth, 1/2 cup at a time, stirring constantly until each portion of the broth is nearly absorbed before adding the next.
6. Remove from heat; stir in 1/4 cup of feta cheese, parsley, and parmesan cheese.
7. Spoon rice mixture into a serving bowl.
8. Top with remaining feta and pepper.
